leadText: Scrappy (Japanese: きもったま Spunk) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Scrappy enables the Pokémon with this Ability to hit Ghost-type Pokémon with damage-dealing Normal - and Fighting-type moves. From Generation VIII onwards, Scrappy now also grants an immunity to Intimidate . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Scrappy has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Scrappy enables the Pokémon with this Ability to hit Ghost-type Pokémon with damage-dealing Normal - and Fighting-type moves. From Generation VIII onwards, Scrappy now also grants an immunity to Intimidate .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D * Enables the Pokémon to hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. MD T D * Increases the damage inflicted on Ghost-type enemies with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. MD S Increases the damage inflicted on Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. B S L ゴーストタイプの ポケモンに ノーマル かくとう タイプのわざの ダメージがあがる MD GtI Unavailable S MD Ghost-type Pokémon can be hit by Normal- and Fighting-type moves! MD RT DX Ghost-type Pokémon can be hit by Normal- and Fighting-type moves.
